body.title: [triage] Fix pre-existing collection errors: tests/igor/test_layer3_* + test_layer4_nodes import missing claudecode.seed_layer* modules
body.intention: I intend that the igor layer3/layer4 test suite collects without ImportError, so those tests actually run instead of silently erroring out at collection.
body.description:
**Pre-existing failure (found during the 2026-07-02 alarm/identity sprint batch; NOT caused by it — none of the batch's touched files appear in the traceback).** 9 test modules under tests/igor/ fail at COLLECTION with ModuleNotFoundError:
- tests/igor/test_layer3_constrain.py -> `claudecode.seed_layer3_constrain`
- tests/igor/test_layer3_decompose.py -> `claudecode.seed_layer3_decompose`
- tests/igor/test_layer3_hypothesize.py -> `claudecode.seed_layer3_hypothesize`
- tests/igor/test_layer3_observe.py -> `claudecode.seed_layer3_observe`
- tests/igor/test_layer3_parse_goal.py -> `claudecode.seed_layer3_parse_goal`
- tests/igor/test_layer3_replan.py -> `claudecode.seed_layer3_replan`
- tests/igor/test_layer3_scope_check.py -> `claudecode.seed_layer3_scope_check`
- tests/igor/test_layer3_situate.py -> `claudecode.seed_layer3_situate`
- tests/igor/test_layer4_nodes.py -> `claudecode.seed_layer4_read_codebase`

**Root cause (likely):** the `claudecode.*` import root no longer resolves — the seed modules were moved/renamed (e.g. to `devlab.claudecode.*` under the single-package reorg) or deleted, but these test imports weren't updated. Investigate whether the seed_layer* modules still exist and under what path; fix the imports (or delete the tests if the seeds are retired).

**Completion criteria:** `python -m pytest tests/igor/ --co -q` collects with 0 errors (or the obsolete tests are removed with a note in the commit).

**Test plan:** re-run the collection command above; assert no ERROR lines. If the seed modules are genuinely gone, the honest close is removing the dead tests.

**Affected files:** tests/igor/test_layer3_*.py, tests/igor/test_layer4_nodes.py (imports); possibly the seed_layer* module locations.

**Observable via:** the pytest collection summary line dropping from '9 errors' to '0 errors'.

**Scope boundary:** import/collection fix only — not a rewrite of the layer3/4 test logic.
